plugins.name: Header Clock
plugins.description: Adds a 'Now' button to the header that toasts the current time. Useful as a minimal reference for registerHeaderButton.
plugins.author: easyDBAccess reference

plugins.name: Cell Link Renderer
plugins.description: Renders http(s) URLs and phone-like values in string cells as clickable links. A pencil toggles to edit mode.
plugins.author: easyDBAccess reference
